name: paarrot
description: Paarrot - A Matrix client based on Cinny

scripts.android:prepare: node scripts/apply-overlay.mjs && cd cinny && npm install && npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: cd cinny && npx cap open android
scripts.android:run: cd cinny && npx cap run android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:prepare && cd cinny/android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd ../.. && node scripts/restore-cinny.mjs
scripts.android:apk:linux: npm run android:prepare && npm run android:patch-settings:linux && cd cinny/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cd ../.. && node scripts/restore-cinny.mjs
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run android:prepare && cd cinny/android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease && cd ../.. && node scripts/restore-cinny.mjs
scripts.android:apk:release:linux: npm run android:prepare && npm run android:patch-settings:linux && cd cinny/android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd ../.. && node scripts/restore-cinny.mjs
scripts.android:aab: npm run android:prepare && cd cinny/android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease && cd ../.. && node scripts/restore-cinny.mjs
scripts.android:aab:linux: npm run android:prepare && npm run android:patch-settings:linux && cd cinny/android && ./gradlew bundleRelease && cd ../.. && node scripts/restore-cinny.mjs
